title: Welcome to ACCT 3220: Corporate Financial Reporting
content:
Hi Class,

I hope you had a great summer! Our ACCT 3220 Canvas page is now live and ready for you to explore.

On Canvas you’ll find:

  • The syllabus with course expectations

  • The class calendar (please note midterm dates)

  • Week 1 materials to help you get started

If you have any questions, feel free to email me at jeremiah.contreras@colorado.edu. I’m looking forward to meeting you all on Monday and starting a great semester together!

Best,
Prof. Contreras
